name: create-feature
description: Generate a feature object for the feature request.

title.description: Assign a name to the feature. The name should be short and to the point.

description.description: Provide a brief but detailed description of the feature.

priority.description: Assign a priority to the feature. If the user provided a priority level in the prompt, use the priority level. Otherwise, assign a priority level based on the importance of the feature.
